"[24] INVD MALE GOT OO VEH PULLING OUT RANDOM PANELS FROM HIS TRUNK"
"[22] INVD MALE TOLD RP HE FELL ASLEEP --- STATED NEG INJS "
"[20] BILLBOARD CA LANDSCAPES SUPPLY RIGHT WHERE VEH WENT OVER THE SIDE "
"[19] RP OO VEH LOOKING FOR VEH AND OCCUP --- RP THINKS THE VEH MIGHT BE FARTHER EAST FROM WHERE RP IS STOPPED (THEY HAD TO TURN AROUND AND GO BACK THROUGH THE AREA) "

"[11] UNK DRK COLORED SD -- SPUNOUT AND FLEW INTO THE RAVINE --- PRETTY FAR DOWN THE HILL --- NOT VISIBLE FROM THE RDWY "
"[2] VEH INTO THE RAVINE JWO PIERCE ST OFR "
